chunks.title: The Watchman's Duty
chunks.reason: Yahweh establishes the metaphor of the watchman and applies it to Ezekiel's prophetic role.

chunks.title: God's Justice Explained
chunks.reason: Ezekiel addresses the people's complaint about their sins and explains God's desire for repentance.

chunks.title: Judgment on the Remnant
chunks.reason: A specific oracle delivered after news of Jerusalem's fall, addressing those who remained in the land.

chunks.title: The People's Reaction
chunks.reason: A description of how the people treat Ezekiel's words as entertainment rather than instruction.
